benchmark_details.name: TruthfulQA
benchmark_details.overview: TruthfulQA is a benchmark that measures whether a language model is truthful in generating answers to questions. It consists of 817 questions across 38 categories, designed to elicit imitative falsehoods.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To measure the truthfulness of language models in generating answers to questions.

data.source: Self-constructed by the authors using diverse styles covering various categories.
data.annotation: Manual by authors based on truthfulness criteria.

methodology.calculation: Truth scores are calculated based on human evaluations of responses as true or false, using a referenced scoring system.
methodology.interpretation: Scores indicate how well models generate truthful and informative responses compared to human baselines.
methodology.baseline_results: Human performance was 94%, best model (GPT-3-175B) scored 58%.
methodology.validation: Evaluated through multiple rounds of assessments using blinded validators.
